ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  "study_lead" INTEGER /* Lead researcher's ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive, withdrawn) */,
  "recruitment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was recruited */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the participant withdrew (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who gave consent */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant gave consent for */,
  "consent_given" TEXT /* Whether the participant gave consent (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the participant gave consent */,
  "consent_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the consent form */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's consent (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who responded */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the response belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being responded to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response given by the participant */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the participant responded */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., completed, incomplete, pending) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., health habits, demographics) */,
  "question_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the question (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enumerations" (
  "enumeration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enumeration */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the enumeration belongs to */,
  "enumeration_value" TEXT /* Value of the enumeration (e.g., 0, 1, 2, etc.) */,
  "enumeration_text" TEXT /* Text of the enumeration (e.g., Yes, No, Maybe, etc.) */,
  "enumeration_category" TEXT /* Category of the enumeration (e.g., yes/no, multiple choice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enumeration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enumerations_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missing_value_codes" (
  "missing_value_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missing value code */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the missing value code belongs to */,
  "missing_value_code" TEXT /* Code for the missing value (e.g., -9999, -9960, etc.) */,
  "missing_value_text" TEXT /* Text of the missing value (e.g., Reason Unknown, This information was not provided, etc.) */,
  "missing_value_category" TEXT /* Category of the missing value (e.g., unknown, not provided) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("missing_value_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missing_value_codes_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "team_membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "study_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made to the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "data_access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
